chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.D-691 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on M.A.No.3132/2021 (U/ A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.3133/2021 (E/ A). 04. For hearing of main case. 21.12.2021 Syed Kazim Raza Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the respondents are upsetting the promotion of the petitioner as Head Constable, who otherwise has been promoted legally; therefore, they be restrained from reverting the petitioner as Constable. The petitioner admittedly is a public servant, therefore, the issue of his promotion/reversion could only be adjudicated by a Service Tribunal having jurisdiction and not by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E
